summary: Tested the new Projects ecosystem (Projects, CreateProject, ProjectDetail, ProjectManage pages) and all related changes. Found and fixed a CRITICAL bug where Project/ProjectAttachment/ProjectInquiry/SavedProject entities were missing from base44Client.js ENTITY_NAMES array, causing Dashboard and Projects pages to be stuck in infinite loading. After fix, all features work correctly. 28 backend tests all passed.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: base44Client.js ENTITY_NAMES array was missing Project, ProjectAttachment, ProjectInquiry, SavedProject. This caused undefined errors when calling base44.entities.Project.filter() etc., so setLoading(false) was never called and both Dashboard and Projects page were stuck in infinite loading spinner.
integration_issues.status: FIXED by adding missing entities to ENTITY_NAMES

action_items: Minor: CreateProject.jsx has duplicate key 'production_notes' in useState form state (lines ~139 and ~150). Second value wins — no functional bug but should be cleaned up.
Minor: AdminDashboard.jsx has dead code for tab === 'casting' block. Should be removed for code cleanliness.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED (by T1): base44Client.js ENTITY_NAMES array missing Project/ProjectAttachment/ProjectInquiry/SavedProject — caused infinite loading on Dashboard and /projects pages. Critical regression from GitHub PR.
CreateProject.jsx: duplicate key 'production_notes' in form useState object. Should remove the duplicate on line ~150.
AdminDashboard.jsx: dead 'casting' tab code block still present in render logic. Tab is removed from TABS array so it never renders but code should be cleaned up.
base44Client.js: ENTITY_NAMES must be kept in sync whenever new backend entities are added — recommend a comment noting this maintenance requirement.
test_credentials: Admin: brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au (OTP flow — code retrieved from db.login_codes)
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during backend tests (TEST_Project_Iter13, TEST_ViewCount_Project, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects ecosystem is working after base44Client.js fix. Backend: all 28 tests pass. Frontend: /projects, Dashboard (My Projects section), /projects/new (CreateProject 4-step form), AdminDashboard (Projects tab), SearchDirectory (no availability filter) all verified working. Nav shows 'Projects' not 'Casting'. No FOUNDER badge visible. PRO badge mapped correctly in ProfileCard. The critical fix is in /app/frontend/src/api/base44Client.js line 70-75.

rca_of_issue.bug: Dashboard and /projects page stuck in infinite loading spinner
rca_of_issue.root_cause: base44Client.js ENTITY_NAMES array (line 70-75) did not include the 4 new entities added by the GitHub PR: Project, ProjectAttachment, ProjectInquiry, SavedProject. Therefore base44.entities.Project etc. were all undefined. When Dashboard/Projects.jsx called base44.entities.Project.filter() or .list(), it threw TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'filter'). Since setLoading(false) is at the end of the async load function, the uncaught error prevented it from being called, leaving the loading spinner permanently visible.
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe infinite loading spinner — page never loads project list
4. Observe infinite loading spinner — dashboard content never renders
